why_tempus: Dr. Osei is evaluating tissue-profiling options for his colorectal practice. The Comprehensive Therapy Selection bundle provides a solution that combines DNA and RNA sequencing to address his interest in panel breadth and RNA coverage.
supporting_crm_excerpt: Before switching, he wants to understand the breadth of Tempus's tissue DNA panel and whether RNA can be included.

product_snapshot.display_text: xT CDx is an FDA-approved 648-gene tissue-based next-generation sequencing test for molecular profiling of malignant solid tumors.
xR provides whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing for solid tumors and hematologic malignancies.
Tempus states that Comprehensive Therapy Selection orders for solid tumors include xT CDx DNA sequencing, xR RNA sequencing, and a curated selection of biomarker tests based on cancer type.

objection_response.text: The xT CDx test is an FDA-approved 648-gene tissue-based next-generation sequencing test for molecular profiling of malignant solid tumors. To address your interest in RNA coverage, xR provides whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing for solid tumors and hematologic malignancies. In a retrospective analysis of patients with identified fusions, incorporating RNA sequencing identified 29% more patients with a unique clinically actionable fusion match than DNA sequencing alone.

meeting_script.text: Dr. Osei, I understand you are evaluating tissue-profiling options and have questions regarding panel breadth and RNA coverage. The xT CDx is an FDA-approved 648-gene tissue-based next-generation sequencing test for molecular profiling of malignant solid tumors. Additionally, xR provides whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing for solid tumors and hematologic malignancies. These are available together through our Comprehensive Therapy Selection bundle. May I walk you through the process of ordering this combined assessment for your colorectal patients?
